meta.title: RAG - but with Verified Citations!
meta.description:
➡️ ADVANCED-inference Repo (incl. inference scripts in this vid.): https://trelis.com/ADVANCED-inference/
➡️ Trelis Endpoints (alpha release): https://endpoints.Trelis.com

OTHER TRELIS LINKS:
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Trelis Resources and Support: https://Trelis.com/About

Credit Rohan Sharma for help building Trelis Endpoints as part of the Trelis Internships program (find out more at Trelis.com).

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Verifying your RAG citations
0:35 Video Overview
1:31 Demo using ChatGPT
9:51 RAG Citation verification with BM25 and cosine similarity
30:58 Trelis Endpoints App Demo - one-click document RAG
